name: Context boundary confusion between § 4.130 and § 4.125
description: Without sentinel tags, the model misattributes the DSM-5 diagnostic conformance requirement from § 4.125 to the adjacent § 4.130. Sentinel tags fix this by giving the model unambiguous anchoring.
query: Which specific CFR section contains the DSM-5 diagnostic conformance requirement — the one about returning reports to the examiner?
